name: todo-matrix
description: A productivity-focused Todo application built with React, utilizing the Eisenhower Matrix to prioritize tasks by Urgency and Importance.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @todo-matrix/shared && concurrently -n shared,backend,frontend -c cyan,green,blue "npm run dev -w @todo-matrix/shared" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontendTS"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @todo-matrix/shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontendTS

author: YC-TAN
